## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss AI-assisted reformatting of Guru knowledge base cards for RAMP Holdings.](https://fathom.video/share/wH9mg71KzSQ_D4T7xibFGqvbxX2wCJVn?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [RAMP uses Guru for internal knowledge management, with \~300 cards needing standardization](https://fathom.video/share/wH9mg71KzSQ_D4T7xibFGqvbxX2wCJVn?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Three card types identified: Inform, Troubleshoot, and Procedure](https://fathom.video/share/wH9mg71KzSQ_D4T7xibFGqvbxX2wCJVn?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)
  - [AI approach: reorganize content into templated sections without altering core information](https://fathom.video/share/wH9mg71KzSQ_D4T7xibFGqvbxX2wCJVn?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)
  - [Marcel demonstrated initial workflow setup in Air Ops platform for card reformatting](https://fathom.video/share/wH9mg71KzSQ_D4T7xibFGqvbxX2wCJVn?tab=summary&timestamp=455.0)

## Topics

### Current State of Guru Knowledge Base

  - [Several hundred cards in support collection](https://fathom.video/share/wH9mg71KzSQ_D4T7xibFGqvbxX2wCJVn?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Written by dozens of people over 5 years](https://fathom.video/share/wH9mg71KzSQ_D4T7xibFGqvbxX2wCJVn?tab=summary&timestamp=602.0)
  - [Inconsistent formats, lengths, and styles](https://fathom.video/share/wH9mg71KzSQ_D4T7xibFGqvbxX2wCJVn?tab=summary&timestamp=608.0)
  - [Need for continuity and standardization](https://fathom.video/share/wH9mg71KzSQ_D4T7xibFGqvbxX2wCJVn?tab=summary&timestamp=616.0)

### Proposed Solution Framework

  - [Define 3 card types: Inform, Troubleshoot, Procedure](https://fathom.video/share/wH9mg71KzSQ_D4T7xibFGqvbxX2wCJVn?tab=summary&timestamp=694.0)
  - [Create templates for each card type with specific sections](https://fathom.video/share/wH9mg71KzSQ_D4T7xibFGqvbxX2wCJVn?tab=summary&timestamp=718.0)
  - [Use AI to fit existing content into new template structure](https://fathom.video/share/wH9mg71KzSQ_D4T7xibFGqvbxX2wCJVn?tab=summary&timestamp=723.0)
  - [Key constraint: Preserve original content without rewriting or altering terminology](https://fathom.video/share/wH9mg71KzSQ_D4T7xibFGqvbxX2wCJVn?tab=summary&timestamp=739.0)

### AI Workflow Setup (Air Ops platform)

  - [Imported Guru card data (CSV export with HTML content)](https://fathom.video/share/wH9mg71KzSQ_D4T7xibFGqvbxX2wCJVn?tab=summary&timestamp=1027.0)
  - [Configured comp config for easy variable management](https://fathom.video/share/wH9mg71KzSQ_D4T7xibFGqvbxX2wCJVn?tab=summary&timestamp=1052.0)
  - [Defined initial problem statement and guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/wH9mg71KzSQ_D4T7xibFGqvbxX2wCJVn?tab=summary&timestamp=1111.0)
  - [Created basic template structure for troubleshooting cards (6 sections)](https://fathom.video/share/wH9mg71KzSQ_D4T7xibFGqvbxX2wCJVn?tab=summary&timestamp=1283.0)
  - [Implemented content preservation rules (e.g., "Keep the content of substance the same. Don't change any terminology.")](https://fathom.video/share/wH9mg71KzSQ_D4T7xibFGqvbxX2wCJVn?tab=summary&timestamp=1373.0)

### Initial Test Results

  - [Demonstrated reorganization of content into defined sections](https://fathom.video/share/wH9mg71KzSQ_D4T7xibFGqvbxX2wCJVn?tab=summary&timestamp=1569.0)
  - [Showed potential for improvement in readability and structure](https://fathom.video/share/wH9mg71KzSQ_D4T7xibFGqvbxX2wCJVn?tab=summary&timestamp=1639.0)
  - [Highlighted need for further refinement and testing](https://fathom.video/share/wH9mg71KzSQ_D4T7xibFGqvbxX2wCJVn?tab=summary&timestamp=1670.0)

## Next Steps

  - [B.J. to experiment with the workflow setup in Air Ops](https://fathom.video/share/wH9mg71KzSQ_D4T7xibFGqvbxX2wCJVn?tab=summary&timestamp=1711.0)
  - [Test multiple card examples and iterate on the approach](https://fathom.video/share/wH9mg71KzSQ_D4T7xibFGqvbxX2wCJVn?tab=summary&timestamp=1719.0)
  - [Identify specific challenges or limitations in the current setup](https://fathom.video/share/wH9mg71KzSQ_D4T7xibFGqvbxX2wCJVn?tab=summary&timestamp=1735.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up meeting to review progress and refine the solution](https://fathom.video/share/wH9mg71KzSQ_D4T7xibFGqvbxX2wCJVn?tab=summary&timestamp=1750.0)
